threats.title: Trellix Confirms Source Code Breach With Unauthorized Repository Access
threats.summary: Cybersecurity company Trellix has announced that it suffered a breach that enabled unauthorized access to a "portion" of its source code. It said it "recently identified" the compromise of its source code repository and that it began working with "leading forensic experts" to resolve the matter immediately. threats.title: 30,000 Facebook Accounts Hacked via Google AppSheet Phishing Campaign
threats.summary: A newly discovered Vietnamese-linked operation has been observed using a Google AppSheet as a "phishing relay" to distribute phishing emails with an aim to compromise Facebook accounts. The activity has been codenamed AccountDumpling by Guardio, with the scheme selling the stolen accounts back through an illicit storefront run by the threat actors. threats.title: Cybercrime Groups Using Vishing and SSO Abuse in Rapid SaaS Extortion Attacks
